title: Umami Malaysian Bok Choi Stir-fry
description: A creamy, midnight-craving stir-fry that marries fresh bok choi with umami sauces, perfect for flexitarian nights.
instructions: Place the bok choi wedges in a single layer and air fry for 8 minutes until crisp, flipping halfway.
While the bok choi is air frying, heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and ginger, stir-fry for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add tofu cubes and cook until golden, about 4 minutes, tossing occasionally.
Stir in soy sauce, oyster sauce, peanut butter, lime juice, and sesame oil, mixing until tofu is evenly coated.
Reduce heat to medium, add the air-fried bok choi to the wok, and toss everything together for 2 minutes.
Adjust seasoning with extra salt or lime if needed.
Remove from heat and transfer the stir-fry to a serving bowl.
Serve hot and enjoy the umami-packed flavor.
